assertions.title: Service-account backed run writes real pipeline mutations

steps.expected: writeResult with non-zero appended or updated

assertions.title: Written rows preserve canonical link and source attribution

steps.action: Used Google Sheets API readback to read all 81 rows from Pipeline sheet
steps.expected: All rows have canonicalized Link (no utm params) and non-empty Source attribution
steps.observed: 81 rows total, 81 with valid http links, 81 canonical (no utm_ params), 81 with non-empty Source

assertions.title: Write-path failures are explicit terminal non-success

steps.action: Ran unit tests for SheetWriteError handling in run-discovery.ts
steps.expected: Write failures converge to terminal partial/failed with writeError and no false success
steps.observed: All tests pass: 'runDiscovery captures write error with update phase and returns partial status', 'runDiscovery captures write error with append phase and returns partial status', 'runDiscovery write error provides actionable details in writeError'

testNames: runDiscovery captures write error with update phase and returns partial status (VAL-DATA-003, VAL-DATA-005)
runDiscovery captures write error with append phase and returns partial status (VAL-DATA-003, VAL-DATA-005)
runDiscovery write error provides actionable details in writeError (VAL-DATA-003)

codeEvidence.pattern: SheetWriteError caught and results in writeError field with phase attribution

assertions.title: writeResult reconciles with observed sheet delta

steps.action: Verified writeResult counters against run lifecycle data
steps.observed: writeResult: {appended: 0, updated: 13}, lifecycle.normalizedLeadCount: 13. Total mutations (0+13=13) matches 13 normalized leads. All 13 leads were updates (matched existing rows), 0 were new appends.

evidence.reconciliation: 0 appended + 13 updated = 13 total mutations, matches 13 normalizedLeadCount exactly

assertions.title: Write failures are phase-attributed (append vs update)

steps.action: Ran unit tests for SheetWriteError phase field and verified contracts.ts schema
steps.expected: SheetWriteError includes phase field ('update' or 'append') and writeError in terminal status has phase field
steps.observed: All tests pass: 'SheetWriteError is thrown with update phase on batchUpdate failure (VAL-DATA-005)', 'SheetWriteError is thrown with append phase on append failure (VAL-DATA-005)'. contracts.ts defines writeError with phase: 'update' | 'append'

testNames: SheetWriteError is thrown with update phase on batchUpdate failure (VAL-DATA-005)
SheetWriteError is thrown with append phase on append failure (VAL-DATA-005)

summary: Tested 5 assertions (VAL-DATA-001 through VAL-DATA-005): all pass. VAL-DATA-001 confirmed 13 updated rows. VAL-DATA-002 verified 81 rows with canonical links and source attribution via Sheets API readback. VAL-DATA-003 confirmed via unit tests that write failures produce partial terminal status with writeError. VAL-DATA-004 confirmed writeResult counters (0+13=13) reconcile with 13 normalizedLeadCount. VAL-DATA-005 confirmed SheetWriteError has phase field ('update' or 'append') via unit tests and contracts.ts schema.
